messages.cli.root.description: Agent DevKit CLI and TUI runtime
messages.cli.root.promptArgument: free-form message to send to the agent; without a message opens the TUI
messages.cli.root.removedChatCommand: The "chat" command was removed. Use: agent "your message"
messages.cli.doctor.description: inspect the local Agent DevKit environment without changing state
messages.cli.doctor.option.json: print the doctor report as JSON
messages.cli.init.description: initialize Agent DevKit project state in the current directory
messages.cli.init.option.dryRun: show what would be created without writing files
messages.cli.init.option.json: print the initialization result as JSON
messages.cli.install.description: verify, plan or run lifecycle work for a known dependency
messages.cli.install.option.dryRun: show the plan without executing operations
messages.cli.install.option.verify: verify the dependency instead of planning installation
messages.cli.logs.description: list, read, search and summarize Agent DevKit usage logs
messages.cli.logs.option.limit: maximum number of events to display
messages.cli.logs.option.date: log file date in YYYY-MM-DD format
messages.cli.logs.tail.description: show the most recent usage log events
messages.cli.preferences.description: view and update Agent DevKit user preferences
messages.cli.preferences.setLogRetention.descript: set how many days usage logs are kept
messages.cli.personalization.description: view and update the local agent identity
messages.cli.personalization.update.description: update agent name, character, behavior, tone and detail level
messages.cli.personalization.update.option.name: agent display name
messages.cli.personalization.update.option.charac: base character: kit, drift, joy, volt, yuki, zumi or robot
messages.cli.personalization.update.option.behavi: behavior: balanced, proactive, analytical, creative, pragmatic or minimalist
messages.cli.personalization.update.option.tone: tone: direct, friendly, formal, animated, neutral or succinct
messages.cli.personalization.update.option.detail: detail: minimal, concise, balanced, detailed or technical
messages.cli.personalization.update.option.gender: gender: female, male, neutral or unspecified
messages.cli.personalization.create.option.name: custom character name
messages.cli.personalization.resetCurrent.descrip: remove customization and restore the selected preset
messages.cli.reset.description: remove Agent DevKit state from the current project or global scope
messages.cli.reset.option.dryRun: show what would be removed without deleting files
messages.cli.reset.option.json: print the reset result as JSON
messages.cli.secrets.argument.name: logical credential name
messages.cli.secrets.set.description: store or update an encrypted credential
messages.cli.secrets.set.option.stdin: read the sensitive value from stdin
messages.cli.secrets.audit.argument.name: optional credential name to filter
messages.cli.update.description: list npm versions and plan or run a self-update
messages.cli.update.option.dryRun: show the planned npm update without installing
messages.cli.update.option.json: print the update plan as JSON
messages.cli.update.option.yes: confirm installation of the selected version
messages.cli.tools.description: list available capabilities as executable tools
messages.cli.run.description: execute a capability through the tool runtime
messages.cli.mcp.description: start the Agent DevKit MCP server
messages.cli.mcp.stdio.description: start the MCP server using stdio transport
messages.cli.mcp.http.description: start the MCP server using local Streamable HTTP
messages.cli.mcp.http.option.host: local host to bind the MCP HTTP server
messages.cli.mcp.http.option.port: local port for the MCP HTTP server
messages.cli.mcp.http.option.origin: allowed HTTP origins for MCP calls
messages.doctor.title: Agent DevKit Doctor
messages.doctor.subtitle: local - no credentials required
messages.init.title: Agent DevKit Init  local project state
messages.reset.title: Agent DevKit Reset  local state cleanup
messages.update.title: Agent DevKit Update  npm versions
messages.logs.title: Agent DevKit Logs  usage analysis
messages.dependencies.title: Agent DevKit Dependencies
messages.secrets.title: Agent DevKit Secrets  encrypted local vault
messages.secrets.field.name: name
messages.preferences.title: Agent DevKit Preferences
messages.personalization.title: Agent DevKit Personalization
messages.personalization.field.name: name
messages.characters.kit.name: Kit
messages.characters.kit.description: Balanced, direct and practical for general use.
messages.characters.drift.name: Drift
messages.characters.drift.description: Analytical, careful and structured for deep reasoning.
messages.characters.joy.name: Joy
messages.characters.joy.description: Creative, friendly and exploratory for ideas and composition.
messages.characters.volt.name: Volt
messages.characters.volt.description: Proactive, animated and fast for momentum-driven execution.
messages.characters.yuki.name: Yuki
messages.characters.yuki.description: Feminine, intellectual and pragmatic, with technical precision.
messages.characters.zumi.name: Zumi
messages.characters.zumi.description: Minimalist, succinct and focused on reducing noise.
messages.characters.robot.name: Robot
messages.characters.robot.description: Technical, precise and pragmatic for engineering work.
messages.tui.title: Agent DevKit
messages.cli.alias.description: manage a local command alias for the Agent DevKit CLI
messages.cli.alias.set.description: create or update the local CLI alias
messages.cli.alias.sync.description: recreate the configured local CLI alias shim
messages.cli.alias.shell.description: print a shell command that activates the Agent DevKit bin directory
messages.cli.alias.argument.name: alias command name
messages.alias.title: Agent DevKit CLI Alias
messages.alias.line.name: alias {{name}}
messages.cli.models.description: manage the local LLM model catalog and lifecycle
messages.cli.models.list.description: list catalog models and their install status
messages.cli.models.status.description: show the status of one model (or all of them)
messages.cli.models.install.description: download and install a local model by id
messages.cli.models.install.progress: Downloading model {{id}} (this can take a few minutes)...
messages.cli.models.update.description: update/repair installed models (or a specific id)
messages.cli.models.use.option.agent: set the default model for the agent role
messages.cli.models.use.option.chat: set the default model for the chat role
messages.cli.firstRun.hint: No local model installed. Run: agent models install {{id}}
messages.cli.firstRun.prompt: No local model installed. Install the recommended model {{id}} now? (y/N)
messages.cli.firstRun.installed: Model {{id}} installed and set as default.
messages.cli.firstRun.failed: Failed to install model {{id}}. Try: agent models install {{id}}
messages.models.title: Agent DevKit Models
